## [0.3.0] - 2026-06-10

### Bug Fixes

- Honor compression level 0 in InlineBgzfCompressor ([#340](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/340))
- Accept --compression-level 0 for uncompressed BAM ([#360](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/360)) ([#361](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/361))

### Performance

- Follow-ups from the agilent sort profile ([#344](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/344))
- Bypass libdeflater for deflate stored blocks ([#366](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/366))

## [0.1.3] - 2026-04-11

### Performance

- Implement N+2 worker-pool model for parallel sort I/O ([#242](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/242))

### Refactor

- Replace all unwrap() calls in crates/ with expect() ([#225](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/225))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.1.2] - 2026-03-06

### Miscellaneous Tasks

- Lockstep workspace versions and fix publish workflow ([#132](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/132))

### Refactor

- Deduplicate decompression logic and remove dead code ([#134](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/134))
